Hal: Pani kam do, NPK spray karo
Neem oil ka spray karo shaam ko
Beej shuda karo bijai se pehle
Ghas ke sath Matti bhar do, Daane daar dawai dalo
Beej ko Fungicide se shuda karo
Beej saaf jagah se lo, Roghar poda nikal do
Safed Makkhi ko control karo pehle
Pattay check karo, Matti bhar do tanay me
Nami kam karo, Hawa dar rakhain
Beej 2 ghante fungicide me bhigo do
Khet me pani khara na rakhain
Shaam ko spray karo patton ke neeche
Zameen ka pH 5.2 rakho, Chuna na dalain
Dil wali jagah me Furadan dalo
Subha spray karo pattay sookhe hon
Safed Makkhi control, Roghar poda nikal do
Pani patton pe na parne dain
Tanay me surakh band kar do matti se
Safed Makkhi control sab se zaroori
Phal ko bag me band kar do
Neem oil spray naye pattay pe
Phal tor ke baad garm pani me dabo
Hawa dar bel, Pattay patle karo
Zameen me pani na khara ho
Khet saaf rakho jarri booti se
